name: Chocolate Fudge Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease two 9-inch sandwich tins.
2. Preheat oven to 350°F or Mark 4.
3. Melt the margarine gently in a pan.
4. Pour the melted margarine into the mixing bowl with the sugar and mix well.
5. Add the eggs and mix until combined.
6. Add the sifted flour, cocoa powder, salt, and milk, then add the vanilla essence.
7. Mix until you have a stiff consistency.
8. Line the tins with greaseproof paper and pour the mixture into them.
9. Smooth the tops and bake for 20 minutes.
10. Dust with icing sugar once cool. Serve on the same day.
